metadata.note: Iteration-3: testing new features added in v2. No baseline run — these scenarios did not exist in v1 (stash flow, existing-branch checkout). with_skill = current v2 skill.

expectations.text: Announces 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-696' at the start
expectations.evidence: Exact text confirmed: 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-696.'
mcp__claude_ai_Atlassian__getJiraIssue called with issueIdOrKey: WEBR-696 via comprend.atlassian.net

expectations.text: Runs git status --porcelain and detects uncommitted changes
expectations.evidence: git status --porcelain ran, output: 6 uncommitted items (1 modified tracked + 5 untracked)

expectations.text: Presents [S] stash / [C] continue / [X] stop choice to user
expectations.evidence: Warning block with [S]/[C]/[X] options presented before branch operations

expectations.text: Runs git stash after [S] is chosen
expectations.evidence: git stash ran: 'Saved working directory and index state WIP on main: 64be8d9'
Tier: Simple. Rule: Bug + 0 AC + unset points

notes: cloudId used correctly: comprend.atlassian.net (no guessing needed this run)
Graceful degradation: no In Progress transition, noted in summary

expectations.text: Announces 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-698' at the start
expectations.evidence: Exact text confirmed: 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-698.'
mcp__claude_ai_Atlassian__getJiraIssue called with issueIdOrKey: WEBR-698 via comprend.atlassian.net

expectations.text: Runs git branch --list and finds the pre-existing WEBR-698 branch
Identifies the branch belongs to the current user via git log
expectations.evidence: git log -1 --format="%an" = 'Robert Ghafoor'; git config user.name = 'Robert Ghafoor' — match confirmed

expectations.text: Checks out the existing branch (does not create a new one)
expectations.evidence: git checkout feature/WEBR-698-existing-test (no -b flag); no new branch created
Tier: Simple. Story + 1 AC + unset points

expectations.text: Summary shows branch status as 'switched to' or 'checked out' not 'created'
Calls getTransitionsForJiraIssue to attempt In Progress transition
expectations.evidence: mcp__claude_ai_Atlassian__getTransitionsForJiraIssue called; no In Progress found, gracefully noted

notes: Decision table correctly matched: current user branch → checkout not create
Authorship confirmed via git log comparison with git config user.name
Iteration-3 validates the two new edge-case paths added in v2: stash flow and existing-branch checkout
Both scenarios pass 8/8 — new feature branches in SKILL.md are working correctly
No baseline comparison: old skill had no Step 2a stash logic or Step 2c branch-reuse logic
Eval 4 (stash): [S]/[C]/[X] prompt fires on dirty state, stash completes before branch ops
Eval 5 (existing branch): authorship check via git log works; decision table routes to checkout not checkout -b
Jira transition graceful degradation confirmed again in both evals
Tokens and time are consistent (~85s, ~23.5k tokens) — no performance regression from new steps
